description: Vendor-handled, internal self-handled, and third-party shipping company workflows

stories.title: Vendor-Handled Shipping
stories.goal: Allow vendors to handle shipping and include details in the pricing deal so shipping costs and logistics are transparent and traceable.

rules.reports: Include breakdown of shipping vs. goods cost

stories.title: Internal (Self-Handled) Shipping
stories.goal: Track when the company manages its own shipping so costs are logged against invoices and not tied to vendor contracts.

acceptance_criteria.marking: User marks shipment as 'Internal Shipping' in the system

stories.title: Third-Party Shipping Company
stories.goal: Select a shipping company with its own pricing deal so different providers can be compared for cost efficiency.

setup.shipping_companies: Defined as vendors with 'Shipping Service' category
setup.pricing_deal: Separate deal per company (per km, per weight, per order, fixed rate)

usage_in_po.selection: User selects 'Third-Party Shipping' and chooses a deal during PO confirmation
usage_in_po.separate_invoice: Generated from shipping vendor and linked to shipment

acceptance_criteria.validation: If no shipping company deal defined -> system blocks selection and prompts setup
